description.value: Cost: 1 Effect: You attempt to move an opponent in combat. Declare before rolling. Target must be no more than one size larger than you. Make opposed [[/check skill=athletics]] (Strength + Athletics vs target's Athletics, Acrobatics or Might). Margin 2+: Target is moved 5 feet in a direction chosen by the attacker.

system.effect: You attempt to move an opponent in combat. Declare before rolling. Target must be no more than one size larger than you. Make opposed Athletics check (Strength + Athletics vs target's Athletics, Acrobatics or Might).
system.special: Margin 2+: Target is moved 5 feet in a direction chosen by the attacker.
